name: 05_metrics_source_ext_mssql_asset_vision_vnz_gen7_dbo
statement:
SELECT
  'source' AS table_family,
  'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vnz_gen7' AS catalog_name,
  'dbo' AS schema_name,
  'asset' AS table_name,
  'FOREIGN' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ExportDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ConstructionDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`DisposalDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ConditionDate` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ExportDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ConstructionDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`DisposalDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ConditionDate` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'DeltaUTC|ModifiedUTC|ExportDateUTC|ModifiedUser|ConstructionDate|DisposalDate|ConditionDate' AS freshness_columns
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vnz_gen7`.`dbo`.`asset`
UNION ALL
